title: Lead Frontend Developer at PhonePe South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at PhonePe South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
